entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and help pages are designed to be easy to find and share.
entries.value: Openbare bladsye, onderwerpchats, leerpaaie, bloggidsse en hulpbladsye is ontwerp om maklik te vind en te deel.

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Begin leer

entries.source: Public learning pages are open, while API routes, admin routes, reset flows, and private utility pages remain blocked.
entries.value: Openbare leerbladsye is oop, terwyl API-roetes, adminroetes, herstelvloei en private nutsbladsye geblokkeer bly.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public link so learners can start directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Elke leermodus het 'n openbare skakel sodat leerders direk binne die regte leerervaring kan begin.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Gebruik dit wanneer jy na openbare/private grense, leerderveiligheid en skoolvertroue verwys.

entries.source: AI content index
entries.value: KI-inhoudsindeks

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Anders as 'n generiese chatbot, organiseer inspir KI rondom leermodusse sodat leerders kan begin met die soort hulp wat hulle nodig het: wenke, vrae, vasvrae, aktiewe herroeping, rolspel, debat of terugvoer.

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Skoolontplooiings kan aangepas word rondom pasgemaakte inhoud, werkvloeie, prompts en NCERT-belynde leerbehoeftes waar toepaslik.

entries.source: Learning behavior comes first
entries.value: Leergedrag kom eerste

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Openbare gasmodusse gee enigiemand 'n nuttige plek om te begin, terwyl skool- en vennootontplooiings die ervaring vir plaaslike behoeftes kan aanpas.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Elke kernleermodus het 'n openbare gas-ingangspunt sodat mense vanuit soektog, sosiaal of 'n gedeelde skakel kan begin.

entries.source: Can a rollout start small?
entries.value: Kan 'n uitrol klein begin?

entries.source: 1M+ learners
entries.value: 1M+ leerders

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: Die doel is nie om mense passief voor KI te maak nie. Die doel is om elke leerder 'n geduldige eerste plek te gee om te vra, te oefen, terugvoer te kry, weer te probeer en selfvertroue te bou.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes open at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir maak leermodusse oop by /chat/{topicSlug}, wat leerders direk binne die regte KI-leerervaring laat land sonder dat hulle 'n gestoorde private chat nodig het.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: Die openbare produk bly maklik om te probeer: leerders kan direk op 'n leermodus land en as gas begin. Skole en CSR-vennote kan pasgemaakte ontplooiings ondersteun wanneer gemeenskappe vertroulikheid, kurrikulumbelyning of gesubsidieerde toegang nodig het.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Verskillende leertake het verskillende interaksievorme nodig, daarom gebruik inspir aktiewe, modusspesifieke onderrig. 'n Huiswerkwenk, Sokratiese vraag, historiese simulasie, flitskaarthersiening en skryfkritiek behoort nie soos dieselfde generiese chat op te tree nie.

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir het as 'n Facebook-bladsy begin wat vasvrae gepubliseer en 'n gewoonte van buitekurrikulêre leer gebou het.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Die openbare produk hou leer maklik om te probeer, terwyl skole en CSR-vennote pasgemaakte ontplooiings kan ondersteun wanneer gemeenskappe vertroulikheid, kurrikulumbelyning of befondsde toegang nodig het.

entries.source: Learning is for everyone.
entries.value: Leer is vir almal.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: Die openbare produk is maklik om eers te probeer, terwyl skole en vennote pasgemaakte ontplooiings vir gemeenskapsbehoeftes kan verken.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Ja. 'n Skool kan begin deur openbare modusse te toets, en dan na 'n loodsprojek of pasgemaakte ontplooiing beweeg wanneer die gebruiksgeval, inhoudsbehoeftes en befondsingspad duidelik is.

entries.source: Public guest-mode links exist so learners can start directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, or shared recommendations.
entries.value: Openbare gasmodus-skakels bestaan sodat leerders direk in nuttige leermodusse kan begin vanuit soektog, sosiale skakels, skole of gedeelde aanbevelings.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from simple /chat/{topicSlug} links.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers and are not part of public pages, public reference files, or shared learning catalogs.
entries.value: Nee. Private gestoorde chats gebruik private identifiseerders en is nie deel van openbare bladsye, openbare verwysingslêers of gedeelde leerkatalogusse nie.

entries.source: Start directly in the right learning mode for homework hints, maths steps, writing critique, quizzes, flashcards, or exam planning.

entries.source: Assistant and reference tools can use public learning pages to point people toward the right guides and guest modes.
entries.value: Assistent- en verwysingshulpmiddels kan openbare leerbladsye gebruik om mense na die regte gidse en gasmodusse te wys.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir organiseer KI rondom leermodusse met spesifieke onderriggedrag: verduidelikings, Sokratiese vrae, huiswerkwenke, vasvrae, flitskaarte, debat, rolspel, skryfterugvoer en studiebeplanning.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Skole kan inspir eers deur openbare gasmodusse evalueer, en dan pasgemaakte KI-leerruimtes met pasgemaakte werkvloeie, vertroulikheidsbeplanning, kurrikulumbehoeftes en befondsde toegangspaaie verken.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: Die gemeenskap het uitgebrei deur skole, universiteite, kompetisies, buitekurrikulêre programme en leergemeenskappe.

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: Die volgende fase is oopbron, bydraervriendelik en gekoppel aan die wyer internasionale uitbou by inspir.uk.

entries.source: Now rebuilt as open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints.
entries.value: Nou herbou as oop, gasvriendelike KI-leer-ingangspunte.

entries.source: Structured catalog of public pages, modes, learning paths, blog clusters, and privacy boundaries.
entries.value: Gestruktureerde katalogus van openbare bladsye, modusse, leerpaaie, blogklusters en privaatheidsgrense.

entries.source: The goal is to help people find the right public learning page quickly. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open; API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay closed.
entries.value: Die doel is om mense te help om die regte openbare leerbladsy vinnig te vind. Openbare roetes, gidse en leerhubs is oop; API-, admin-, herstel- en private nutsroetes bly gesluit.

entries.source: Use this when citing the long-form guide library, study prompts, and mode-specific articles.
entries.value: Gebruik dit wanneer jy die langvorm-gidsbiblioteek, studie-aanwysings en modusspesifieke artikels aanhaal.

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: Begrip bo antwoorde

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: Gebruik https://inspirlearning.com vir die webwerf, /mission vir die missie, /topics vir die openbare leermodusgids, en /chat/learn-anything vir die verstek gasleerervaring.

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: Skooluitrolle kan beplan word rondom studenteprivaatheid, personeeltoesig en die praktiese grense wat 'n leergemeenskap nodig het.

entries.source: Create a safer route for practice, explanations, feedback, and revision prompts without sending students into a generic chatbot.
entries.value: Skep 'n veiliger roete vir oefening, verduidelikings, terugvoer en hersieningsprompts sonder om studente na 'n generiese chatbot te stuur.

entries.source: Public reference files summarize learning pages, routes, modes, guides, and citation boundaries for tools that need a concise map.
entries.value: Openbare verwysingslêers som leerbladsye, roetes, modusse, gidse en aanhalingsgrense op vir hulpmiddels wat 'n bondige kaart nodig het.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir het in 2013 as 'n openbare vasvra- en leergemeenskap begin, deur skole en studentenetwerke gegroei, en later KI-leerinfrastruktuur en openbare KI-tutoringervarings ontwikkel.

entries.source: white label AI learning platform
entries.value: wit-etiket KI-leerplatform

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: inspir bestaan om leer toeganklik, boeiend, aangenaam en nuttig te maak vir enigiemand met nuuskierigheid, of hulle nou 'n student, ouer, onderwyser of selfgeleerde leerder is.

entries.value: API, admin, reset, private nut, en private gestoor-chat oppervlaktes is nie openbare bron inhoud.

entries.source: Public pages can be shared and linked, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities stay closed.
